message:
fix(ci): configure getrandom for WASM and remove broken jobs

- Add .cargo/config.toml with getrandom_backend="wasm_js" for WASM target
- Remove node-smoke and e2e jobs that reference deleted test files
  (removed in da79ef7 "refactor: restore viz-benchmarks.html and cleanup")

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+# Enable getrandom's wasm_js backend for wasm32-unknown-unknown
+[target.wasm32-unknown-unknown]
+rustflags = ['--cfg', 'getrandom_backend="wasm_js"']

@@ -30,28 +30,3 @@ jobs:
       - name: wasm-bindgen tests (firefox headless)
         run: wasm-pack test --headless --firefox
 
-  node-smoke:
-    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
-    steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
-      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
-        with:
-          node-version: '20'
-      - run: npm ci
-      - name: Node smoke test
-        run: npm run test:node
-
-  e2e:
-    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
-    steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
-      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
-        with:
-          node-version: '20'
-      - run: npm ci
-      - name: Install Playwright browsers
-        run: npx playwright install --with-deps
-      - name: Build CSS
-        run: npm run build:css
-      - name: Playwright tests
-        run: npm run e2e
